query:
-- Check remaining unmatched count and data availability
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total_unmatched,
  SUM(CASE WHEN phoneNumber IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(phoneNumber, ' ', ''), '-', ''), '(', ''), ')','')) >= 8 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_phone,
  SUM(CASE WHEN connectionId IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(connectionId)) > 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_connection_id,
  SUM(CASE WHEN locationAddress IS NOT NULL AND locationAddress != 'Unknown Location' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_address
FROM services
WHERE status = 'unmatched'
  AND (billingPeriod IS NULL OR billingPeriod != 'archived');

SELECT

  SUM(CASE WHEN phoneNumber IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(phoneNumber, ' ', ''), '-', ''), '(', ''), ')','')) >= 8 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_phone,
  SUM(CASE WHEN connectionId IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(connectionId)) > 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_connection_id,
  SUM(CASE WHEN locationAddress IS NOT NULL AND locationAddress != 'Unknown Location' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_address
FROM services
WHERE status = 'unmatched'
  AND (billingPeriod IS NULL OR billingPeriod != 'archived');
